issues.claim: Analog not reconstructible from chapter alone
issues.objection: Removed-verse test for 7.24: if 7.24 were removed from the source pack, the chapter alone would not produce this specific engineering analog. The analog depends on the verse's specific structural claim (thread 3 (the unintelligent mistake the manifest for the whole; STRETCHED metaphysics)), which is not stated equivalently elsewhere in the chapter. Tags (full-system-view, operator-system-coupling, system-recognition) anchor on this verse's specific claim. The STRETCHED tag is honest for this verse: Verse claims metaphysical concealment (avyaktaṁ vyaktim āpannaṁ mistaken). Engineering analog scoped narrowly: architecture diagrams are partial; the substrate carried by the senior is not directly diagrammable. Counter-example: stale tacit assumption is not the verse's paraṁ bhāvam.

notes: Removed-verse test for 7.24: analog is anchored on this verse's specific structural claim, not on chapter-level material alone. PASS.
